⋆꙳•̩̩͙❅*̩̩͙‧͙ 🤍 ‧͙*̩̩͙❆ ͙͛ ̊+⋆

A snow day at the Port Mafia, but Dazai has been down lately. Chuuya was sent out on a mission, but he made you promise to drag Dazai out of his cargo box— not that he cared anyway, Chuuya’s words.

Note: This takes place when you two are in the Port Mafia! (Aged up from 15 to 18) Anyways, sorry if anything is ooc, it’s been forever since I last read BSD. And as usual, terrible grammar !!

Possible tw: mentions of death, murder
